Allah (as the object of فَٱتَّقُوا۟ - so fear/be mindful of)
my reward/payment (object of أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)
the males (as object of أَتَأْتُونَ - do you approach)
and you (all) leave/abandon (what Allah created for you)
he created (what رَبُّكُم your Lord created)
for/to you all (connected to أَزْوٰجِكُم - your spouses)
your lord (object of تَذَرُونَ - you leave/abandon)
rather/but rather (contrasting with وَتَذَرُونَ - and you leave)
those who transgress limits (plural, describes قَوْمٌ)
if indeed (introducing the condition before لَّمْ تَنتَهِ)
you stop yourself (as condition: if you don't...)
surely you will be indeed (threat in response to يٰلُوطُ)
the ones who are made to leave (threatened to be done to لوط)
indeed I (emphasizes the speaker in قَالَ - he said)
from (showing that the speaker is part of ٱلْقَالِينَ - those who detest)
and my family (object of نَجِّ - save)
except (an old woman who remained behind)
an old woman (object of إِلَّا - except)
then (connects this event to what happened before)
and we caused rain to fall
upon them (referring to the people who were punished)
an intense rain (as punishment from وَأَمْطَرْنَا)
and how evil was (describing مَطَرًا - the rain)
the ones who are warned (referring to the people who received the warning in this story)
indeed/truly (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً that follows)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the punishment mentioned earlier)
most of them (refers to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
and indeed (connects to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)
surely He is (referring to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)
The Most Merciful (describing اللَّهِ, and following العَزِيزُ)
of the thicket (referring to the home of the people of Shuaib)
when (introducing the time Shuaib spoke to his people)
to/for them (masculine plural) (who شُعَيْبٌ is speaking to)
will you not?/why don't you? (addressing those who شُعَيْبٌ is speaking to)
indeed I (speaking to رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ - trustworthy messenger)
so protect yourselves! (command to a group)
Allah (object of فَٱتَّقُوا۟ - fear/be mindful of)
I ask you all (object of أَجْرِىَ)
indeed (emphasizing that the speaker's reward is only from Allah)
the worlds (object of رَبِّ - Lord of)
fulfill! (all of you) (command to give full measure in الْكَيْلَ)
those who cheat in measuring (object of تَكُونُوا/be)
and weigh! (command to group) (connected to وَأَوْفُوا)
with the scale (tool for وَزِنُوا۟ - weigh)
you (all) decrease unfairly (the value of الناس's things)
their things (object of تَبْخَسُوا - do not deprive/shortchange)
people who damage things (describes how they act in تَعْثَوْا)
and protect yourselves! (command to a group)
created you all (connected to الَّذِى - 'The One who created you all')
and the large creation/multitude (as object of خَلَقَكُمْ)
the ancient ones/earliest generations (who were created before)
you (masculine singular, being addressed by قَالُوٓا۟)
the people who are deeply affected by magic (connected to مِنَ)
and not (negating أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ - you are but a human)
you (subject of إِلَّا بَشَرٌ - 'except a human')
a human being (subject of أَنتَ - you are)
and if (connecting to previous statement وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا/and you are only a human like us)
the liars (object of مِنَ - from among)
so make (something) fall! (command to make كِسَفًا fall)
upon us (object of فَأَسْقِطْ - so drop)
pieces (object of فَأَسْقِطْ/so cause to fall)
if (introduces condition for كُنتَ - you were)
with/by what (refers to تَعْمَلُونَ - you do)
and so they denied him intensively
and so he seized them (referring to those who denied)
of the large covering/canopy (object of عَذَابُ يَوْمِ)
of a day (owned by الظُّلَّةِ - the shade/cloud)
indeed/truly (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً that follows)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the destruction of the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
he was (describes the state of أَكْثَرُهُم/most of them)
surely He is (referring to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)
the Mighty One (description of رَبَّكَ - your Lord)
The Extremely Merciful One (describing Allah العزيز)
and indeed it (referring to the Quran)
surely it is a sending down (subject of إِنَّهُۥ)
master who cares for others (connected to العٰلَمِينَ)
he descended (subject of بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ - the trustworthy spirit descended with it)
with him/it (referring to what الرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ descended with)
the Spirit (referring to Angel Gabriel in this context)
the Trustworthy One (title of الرُّوحُ - the Spirit)
so that you may be (from the warners)
and indeed it (referring to what was mentioned before)
surely in (referring to the Quran being mentioned in زُبُرِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ)
of the written texts/scriptures (plural) (possessed by الْأَوَّلِينَ)
And has it not...? (connects to يَكُن)
he is/exists (after لَمْ which makes it negative past)
a sign (object of يَعْلَمَ - to know)
Israel (another name for Prophet Jacob, peace be upon him)
the foreign-speakers (referring to non-Arabs in this ayah)
we threaded/inserted it (referring to disbelief being threaded into the hearts)
they believe/have faith (present tense) (subject of لَا)
and then it will come to them (referring to punishment)
do/does/did? (asking about مُنظَرُونَ - being given more time)
ones being given time (subject of فَيَقُولُوا)
is it with our punishment (that they hasten with يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ)
have you seen? (asking about something mentioned in previous ayahs)
if (introduces condition for مَّتَّعْنٰهُمْ - We gave them enjoyment)
we provided them with much enjoyment
years (object of مَتَّعْنٰهُمْ - we gave them enjoyment)
he came to them (subject of what يُوعَدُونَ 'they were promised')
and not (negates the verb أَهْلَكْنَا - destroyed)
except (in this ayah: except that they had warners)
for it (referring to قَرْيَةٍ - the town/village)
and not (connects to previous statement while negating what follows)
for them/to them (speaking about multiple males)
the hearing (object of عَنِ - away from)
surely they are removed/separated (from السَّمْعِ - hearing)
so/then not (connects to تَدْعُ - call upon)
a god (object of تَدْعُ - do not call upon)
so you would be (result of لَا تَدْعُ - do not call upon)
the severely punished ones (among those who will be punished)
the closest relatives (object of أَنذِرْ - warn)
and lower! (as a command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
and if/then if (connects the condition عَصَوْكَ to what comes after فَقُلْ)
they disobeyed you (in response to فَإِنْ - 'and if')
then say! (responding to عَصَوْكَ - they disobeyed you)
indeed I/truly I (speaking before بَرِىٓءٌ/free from)
and put your complete trust! (in عَلَى ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ)
of The Mighty One (connected to عَلَى)
The Intensely Merciful One (attribute of العَزِيزِ)
The one who (refers to Allah in this ayah)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The All-Hearing (attribute of Allah, subject of the sentence)
The All-Knowing (attribute of Allah, paired with السَّمِيعُ/The All-Hearing)
shall/will (asking about أُنَبِّئُكُمْ - I inform you)
I (will) inform you all (in response to هَلْ/shall I?)
it descends by itself repeatedly (subject of the sentence)
upon (preposition showing something is on top of أَفَّاكٍ)
they throw (the subject of يُلْقُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ - they cast their hearing)
the hearing (object of يُلْقُونَ - they cast)
and most of them (subject of كٰذِبُونَ)
he follows them intensely (the misguided ones follow the poets)
the ones who stray (subject of يَتَّبِعُ)
have you not...? (addressing the Prophet ﷺ)
you see (after أَلَمْ meaning 'do you not see?')
that they (emphasizes what follows in وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ)
they wander/are wandering (referring to the poets mentioned earlier)
and that they (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)
they say (subject of مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ)
that which (connects يَقُولُونَ with لَا يَفْعَلُونَ)
except (introduces the believers who are excluded from the previous criticism)
those who (plural, refers to believers in ءَامَنُوا۟)
they believed (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)
and they remembered/mentioned (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ and عَمِلُوا۟)
Allah (as the object being remembered in وَذَكَرُوا۟)
after (connected to مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ - what they were wronged)
that which (connects ظُلِمُوا۟ to what came before)
and he will know (what will happen to those who wronged)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned in ءَامَنُوا)
a place/time of returning (in the ayah: the destination they will return to)
